query: SELECT 'pickingAllocations' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM pickingAllocations pa JOIN pickingOrders po ON pa.pickingOrderId = po.id WHERE po.isLegacyImported = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'pickingOrderItems' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM pickingOrderItems poi JOIN pickingOrders po ON poi.pickingOrderId = po.id WHERE po.isLegacyImported = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'pickingOrders' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM pickingOrders WHERE isLegacyImported = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute SELECT 'pickingAllocations' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM pickingAllocations pa JOIN pickingOrders po ON pa.pickingOrderId = po.id WHERE po.isLegacyImported = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'pickingOrderItems' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM pickingOrderItems poi JOIN pickingOrders po ON poi.pickingOrderId = po.id WHERE po.isLegacyImported = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'pickingOrders' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM pickingOrders WHERE isLegacyImported = 1;
